data.label: Suspicious
data.explanation: Sis, 'test' lang ang nakalagay? Walang specific claim na pwedeng i-verify. So, I'm labeling this as 'Suspicious' since walang context or detalye talaga.

data.tip: Sis, always look for evidence para hindi ka basta-basta mauto ng mga walang basehang claims, okay?

resibo.verdict: Walang mahanap na resibo si Perri... 👀

literacyLesson.summary: Mhie, parang opinion lang ‘to kasi walang specific na fact or source na binigay para suportahan yung claim.

points.issue: Walang specific details or evidence na binigay yung statement.
points.correction: Dapat may konkretong basis like research, expert testimony, or reliable data para maging credible.

points.issue: Mukhang personal belief lang at walang pinagbasehan.
points.correction: Hanapin mo yung mga statements na may proof para mas sure ka sa validity.

points.issue: Walang credible source na sumusuporta sa claim na 'to.
points.correction: Check kung galing ba sa trusted news outlet, academic institution, or respected expert yung info.

literacyLesson.tip: Sis, always look for evidence para hindi ka basta-basta mauto ng mga walang basehang claims, okay?
